title: PostgreSQL 18 Domain Schema, Keys, Constraints, and Index Intent · Go Semantics Case: Feed Go Index Query Pairing
summary: The database uses URLs as mutable primary keys, repeats publisher strings, permits cross-tenant references, lacks temporal constraints, and indexes without query evidence. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go index query pairing increment in constrained relational feed-service schema. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Pair B-tree, partial, covering, expression, and GIN indexes with measured queries, selectivity, write cost, and removal evidence.
Encode nullability, checks, unique scopes, foreign keys, cascades, timestamps, states, and length budgets in PostgreSQL.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Index Query Pairing · Theory Feed Go Index Query Pairing
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 8236 during an accessible community-news reader review.
